Cherry Cake: A buttery sponge studded with glacé cherries, finished with icing and toasted almonds.
Princesstarta: A Swedish layer cake of sponge, jam, custard and whipped cream wrapped in a dome of green marzipan.
Tiramisu Cake: A coffee-soaked layer cake take on the Italian dessert, with mascarpone cream and a dusting of cocoa.
Povitica: An Eastern European celebration bread rolled around a thin, tightly swirled walnut filling.
Mini Victoria Sponge Cakes: Individual light sponges sandwiched with jam and cream.
Florentines: Thin, lacy biscuits of caramel, nuts and dried fruit with a chocolate-coated underside.
Tea Time Scones: Light, well-risen scones made for splitting and serving with jam and clotted cream.
Schichttorte: A German cake built from many thin layers of batter, each one grilled before the next is added.
Mini Pear Pies: Whole poached pears wrapped in sweet pastry and baked until golden.
Ciabatta: An Italian white loaf with a crisp crust and an open, airy crumb from a very wet dough.
Kouign Amann: A Breton pastry of laminated dough baked so its layers of butter and sugar caramelise.
Angel Food Cake with Lemon Curd: A fatless whisked sponge baked in a ring tin and served with sharp lemon curd.
Apricot Couronne: A French-style crown of sweet enriched dough twisted with apricots and nuts.
Choux Buns Religieuse: Stacked cream-filled choux buns glazed and piped to resemble a little nun.
Hazelnut Dacquoise: Layers of crisp hazelnut meringue sandwiched with coffee custard cream.
Egg Custard Tart: A crisp pastry case holding a just-set egg custard dusted with nutmeg.
Charlotte Royale: A dome of Swiss-roll slices encasing a set fruit bavarois.
Floating Islands with Spun Sugar: Poached meringues floating on vanilla custard, decorated with threads of spun sugar.
Pretzels: Twisted German-style breads with the deep glossy crust that comes from an alkaline dip before baking.
French Classic Tuiles: Wafer-thin biscuits curved over a rolling pin while still warm from the oven.
English Muffins: Yeasted rounds cooked on a griddle, soft inside and made for splitting and toasting.
French Baguette: A long, slashed French loaf with a crackling crust and light, chewy crumb.
Flauones Bread: Cypriot Easter pastries filled with a savoury-sweet cheese and herb mixture.
Frosted Walnut Cake: A layered walnut sponge covered in billowy boiled meringue frosting.
Arlettes: Paper-thin puff pastry biscuits rolled with cinnamon and baked until crisp and caramelised.
Viennese Whirls: Piped melt-in-the-mouth shortbread biscuits sandwiched with jam and buttercream.
Spanish Windtorte: An ornate baroque meringue case filled with cream and decorated with piped meringue flowers.
Marjolaine: A rectangular French gateau layering nut meringue with chocolate and praline creams.
Mokatines: Small square coffee sponge cakes coated and piped with coffee buttercream.
Raspberry Mille-Feuille: Crisp layers of puff pastry stacked with pastry cream and fresh raspberries.
Gluten-free Pita Bread: Flatbreads made without wheat flour, baked hot so they puff into pockets.
Tennis Cake: A Victorian fruit cake iced and decorated to look like a tennis court.
Chocolate Souffles: Airy baked chocolate desserts that must rise tall and go straight to the table.
Jumble Biscuits: Old-fashioned knot-shaped biscuits twisted from a simple sweet spiced dough.
Fougasse: A Provençal flatbread slashed and shaped to look like a leaf or ear of wheat.
Savarin with Chantilly Cream: A ring of yeasted cake soaked in syrup and filled with Chantilly cream and fruit.
Lacey Pancakes: Delicate pancakes made by piping batter into an open lace pattern in the pan.
Dampfnudel: German sweet dumplings steamed in a covered pan so the base caramelises while the top stays soft.
Jaffa Cake: A light sponge base topped with orange jelly and coated in chocolate.
Victoria Sandwich: The classic British sponge sandwiched with raspberry jam and dusted with caster sugar.
Lemon Tartlets: Individual crisp pastry cases filled with a sharp lemon filling.
Bakewell Tart: A shortcrust tart of jam and almond frangipane topped with feathered icing.
